  "findings": [
    "Missing shims under column base plate",
    "Inadequate load transfer to foundation",
    "Column plumb and elevation cannot be maintained without shims"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work on and around the affected column immediately",
    "Barricade area to prevent access beneath unsupported column",
    "Have competent person engineer/approve proper shim pack installation",
    "Install required shims to achieve full bearing and correct alignment",
    "Re-check column plumb and bolt tension after shim installation"
  ],
  "rationale": "Columns erected without required shims do not transfer design loads, may shift during erection, and create a risk of structural instability or collapse. AISC 303 requires full contact bearing for base plates, and OSHA 1926 Subpart R requires columns to be anchored against displacement before releasing hoisting equipment. Missing shims prevent proper alignment and anchorage.",
  "references": [
    "AISC 303-22 - Section 7.3 Base Plate Bearing",
    "OSHA 1926.755 - Column Anchorage",
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart R - Steel Erection"
  ]
